entries.en: A hook in your project configuration (.cursor/hooks.json) has blocked this operation.
entries.zh: 项目配置 (.cursor/hooks.json) 中的钩子已阻止此操作。

entries.en: A hook in your user configuration (~/.cursor/hooks.json) has blocked this operation.
entries.zh: 用户配置 (~/.cursor/hooks.json) 中的钩子已阻止此操作。

entries.en: Adjust the default behavior of sending a message while Agent is streaming
entries.zh: 调整智能体流式响应时发送消息的默认行为

entries.en: Agent instructions; Type @ for tools, / for commands...
entries.zh: 智能体指令；输入 @ 调用工具，/ 调用命令...

entries.en: Agent features require authentication. Please sign in.
entries.zh: 智能体功能需要身份验证，请登录。

entries.en: A beforeSubmitPrompt hook blocked this submission.
entries.zh: beforeSubmitPrompt 钩子已阻止此次提交。

entries.en: A configured hook has blocked this operation.
entries.zh: 已配置的钩子已阻止此操作。

entries.en: Agent is waiting for a command to finish.
entries.zh: 智能体正在等待命令完成。

entries.en: Agent is waiting for commands to finish.
entries.zh: 智能体正在等待命令完成。

entries.en: A team hook has blocked this operation.
entries.zh: 团队钩子已阻止此操作。
智能体审查：检测到潜在问题

entries.en: Agent is using this terminal. It
entries.zh: 智能体正在使用此终端。

entries.en: All changes from this Agent chat
entries.zh: 此智能体聊天的所有更改
等待 MCP 工具批准
